block_00: Trading Anxiety — How Not to Be Afraid
block_01: Anxiety and fear — two enemies that can worm their way even in the most professional trader’s heart. Whether it is at the start of the deal, when something unexpected happens, or even after it is closed, it can hinder your best efforts and strategies.
block_02: Read on how to deal with negative emotions and keep your calm in this article.
block_05: There are many mistakes that a trader can make: trading without a plan, trading against the trend, too much leverage, and so on. However, some can drain your account faster than others. Read about 5 such mistakes in this piece.
block_07: How to Trade with Rainbow Moving Average
block_08: The variety of indicators out there is staggering. Turns out, there is one that looks like a rainbow; it compiles 10 (or more) different moving averages in one useful tool. Read this article to find out how a simple moving average turns into an analytical indicator.
